title: Log More Info
description: Incorporate hardware, system and modpack information like in crash reports but in the logs
body:
Tired of asking your users the java flags they use? The memory they have assigned to Minecraft? Or the version of the modpack they are running? Especially when they have no crash reports.

Well then, this mod will print those details directly in the logs under the `LogMoreInfo:` section

Modpack information is taken from the [Better Compatibility Checker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-compatibility-checker) mod by reading the config/bcc.json file.
It is not required, and you can also have the config/bcc.json file without the BCC mod with this content:

```
{"modpackName":"NAME","modpackVersion":"VERSION"}
```

If you have any suggestions or ideas, you can put them [on GitHub](https://github.com/FederAndInk/log_more_info/discussions)

Feel free to open an issue or pull request too.
